name: Gunslinger
flavor: High Noon — new archetype. The fast-draw duelist: catches a foe flat-footed, then puts them down. Quick but not built to soak Lead (lower Sand). Playtest the +1 reroll.

specialAction.name: Quickdraw
specialAction.summary: Place 1 Drop token on a valid target, then immediately Attack that target with +1 reroll.

effects.text: Catch them flat-footed: 1 Drop on the target.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, make 1 Move after this Attack.
